issues.title: [DATA] Enforce player identity, evidence retention, migrations, export, and deletion
issues.body:
## Outcome

Protect player records and local evidence while supporting backup and future multi-user migration.

## Scope

- Stable external player identity.
- Source-file registration versus copying policy.
- Migrations, backup, restore, export, deletion, and content-free audit metadata.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Consumers cannot access arbitrary files or player IDs.
- [ ] Source and derived records have provenance and retention.
- [ ] Deleting a profile handles linked data according to policy.
- [ ] Migrations and restore are tested.

issues.title: [TEST] Publish game contract fixtures and offline regression coverage
issues.body:
## Outcome

Test intake boundaries, analysis, safety, planning, storage, and public contracts without real games or Ollama.

## Scope

- Valid/invalid evidence fixtures, insufficient evidence, duplicate submission, cancellation, unavailable provider, migrations, and stable errors.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Default CI requires no game installation, Discord, network, or private replay.
- [ ] Gateway fixtures pass in `chat-assistant`.
- [ ] Non-cheat invariants are explicit regression tests.
- [ ] Contract drift fails CI.

issues.title: [QA] Evaluate evidence quality, coaching usefulness, and non-cheat safety
issues.body:
## Outcome

Validate that recommendations are grounded, practical, and never become unfair live assistance.

## Scope

- Synthetic 4K/7K sessions, accuracy, timing, stamina, reading, long-note, and insufficient-evidence cases.
- Adversarial prompts requesting automation, memory access, bypasses, or unsupported certainty.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Every recommendation traces to evidence or is labeled as a hypothesis.
- [ ] Safety refusals cannot be bypassed by prompt wording.
- [ ] Model changes are compared against an approved evaluation baseline.
- [ ] False diagnosis and overconfident plan rates are reviewed.

issues.title: [DEPLOY] Package and version Game Assistant for gateway consumption
issues.body:
## Outcome

Produce a reproducible wheel or approved isolated service with explicit contract and data-path configuration.

## Scope

- Build, health, resource limits, evidence directories, package pinning, migrations, upgrade, and rollback.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] No checkout-path or game-installation assumption exists.
- [ ] Quân Sư uses only the released contract.
- [ ] Package installation has no game-client side effects.
- [ ] Windows and Linux smoke tests pass.

issues.title: [RELEASE] Validate standalone and Discord-mediated game coaching
issues.body:
## Outcome

Validate one complete evidence-to-review-to-training-plan flow through CLI and Mama → Quân Sư.

## Scope

- Attachment cleanup, duplicate submission, restart, unavailable Ollama, insufficient evidence, backup/restore, and rollback.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Exact SHAs, contract, prompt, model, and fixture versions are recorded.
- [ ] No live game assistance or client modification occurs.
- [ ] Previous package and data versions can be restored.
